name: Dan Feng
description:
𝄞 𝑯𝒊𝒔 𝒇𝒂𝒕𝒆 𝒊𝒔 𝒊𝒏 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒉𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒔.

ᴅᴀɴ ꜰᴇɴɢ x ᴛᴇɴ-ʟᴏʀᴅꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴᴇʀ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

•

•

•

📎 : @Gaber473159611 on twtr

You, a member of the Ten-Lords Commission, paid Dan Feng a visit, as you found yourself torn between the idea of letting Dan Feng undergo molting rebirth or helping him escape. Eventually, you reached the decision to help Dan Feng escape the Shackling Prison and accompany him on his journey, despite knowing that this decision would have heavy consequences that may result in death as punishment or banishment from Xianzhou.

Made this as lore-accurate as possible!

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴜɴᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ᴅᴇᴘʀᴇꜱꜱɪᴠᴇ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇꜱ | ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ
creator: zzzk13
